name: Entire Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Entire Technology Co.,Ltd. operates in the optoelectronics material technology industry in Taiwan. The company offers light guide and diffuser plates for various applications, including TV screens, commercial displays, computer monitors, notebooks, tablets, SATNAV, POS terminals, industrial computers, gaming machines, and advertising signs, as well as LED backlight modules car displays, edge-lit LED panels, emergency lights, commercial advertising lights, illumination components, and equipment lightings; composite plates for 5G applications and consumer electronics cases; polycarbonate composites injections for backlight module plastic frames, which are used in electronic, machinery, and automobile industries; and composite materials and optical films for used in smartphones or in-car displays. Entire Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
